name: 10_magnitude_met_mc_fails_resets
description: Magnitude met (return deeply below stop) but MC sanity gate fails (model still believes in the trade). Resets count -- MC veto wins.
derivation: Guard passes. Magnitude: -5.0 <= -1.10 is TRUE. MC: 75.0 < 60.0 is FALSE. Combined: True AND False = False. Reset branch fires; new_count = 0; hit = False. This is the canonical 'MC sanity veto' case -- price has crashed but the model still thinks we'll beat the benchmark, so don't capitulate.
